list.name: Changes
list.comment:
Refactor test app setup and add integration tests for team management
- Replaced `get_app` with a consistent `setup_app` function across integration tests for improved readability and reuse. - Added `team_api_test.rs` to cover the complete team management flow. - Ensured validation for invalid roles and public key formats in the team management tests.

project.component: { "keyToString": { "Cargo.Run.executor": "Run", "Cargo.Test db_test.executor": "Run", "Cargo.Test test_api_sign_event_forbidden_kind.executor": "Run", "Cargo.Test test_api_sign_event_success.executor": "Run", "Cargo.Test test_db_init_and_tables.executor": "Run", "Cargo.Test test_health_check_handler.executor": "Run", "Cargo.Test test_relay_client_new.executor": "Run", "HTTP Request.All in health_get.executor": "Run", "HTTP Request.All in logs_get.executor": "Run", "HTTP Request.All in sign_post.executor": "Run", "HTTP Request.All in status_get.executor": "Run", "HTTP Request.health_get | GET request to health.executor": "Run", "HTTP Request.logs_get | GET request to logs.executor": "Run", "HTTP Request.sign_post | POST request to sign with empty content (should fail).executor": "Run", "HTTP Request.status_get | GET request to status.executor": "Run", "ModuleVcsDetector.initialDetectionPerformed": "true", "RunOnceActivity.MCP Project settings loaded": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "RunOnceActivity.rust.reset.selective.auto.import": "true", "RunOnceActivity.typescript.service.memoryLimit.init": "true", "com.intellij.ml.llm.matterhorn.ej.ui.settings.DefaultModelSelectionForGA.v1": "true", "git-widget-placeholder": "master", "junie.onboarding.icon.badge.shown": "true", "last_opened_file_path": "/home/gary/Documents/threenine/bancwr-diogel", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.detected.package.tslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "nodejs_package_manager_path": "npm", "org.rust.cargo.project.model.PROJECT_DISCOVERY": "true", "org.rust.cargo.project.model.impl.CargoExternalSystemProjectAware.subscribe.first.balloon": "", "org.rust.first.attach.projects": "true", "rest.client.default.execution.environment": "local", "to.speed.mode.migration.done": "true", "vue.rearranger.settings.migration": "true" }, "keyToStringList": { "DatabaseDriversLRU": [ "duckdb" ] } }

task.summary: Initialize project with essential files and dependencies: - Added `Cargo.toml` with core dependencies (`tokio`, `nostr`, `anyhow`, etc.). - Created `main.rs` with a basic async entry point. - Added initial re-export in `lib.rs`. - Included `.gitignore` for `.idea/` files. - Added development guidelines to `.junie/guidelines.md`. - Generated `Cargo.lock` file.

Add health check, server, and configuration modules with tests
- Introduced `config.rs` for loading environment variables and configuration management. - Implemented `server.rs` with a basic health check endpoint (`GET /health`). - Added test files for unit and integration tests: `config_test.rs`, `server_test.rs`, and `api_test.rs`. - Extended `README.md` with usage, API description, and testing instructions. - Updated `.gitignore` to exclude `.env` files. - Added necessary dependencies (`axum`, `dotenvy`, `serde`, etc.) to `Cargo.toml`.

Add event signing feature, Docker support, and improved server architecture
- Added `POST /sign` endpoint for signing events with validation and detailed error handling. - Introduced the `Signer` struct to securely handle key operations. - Updated `server.rs` with `tower-http` for request tracing and middleware support. - Expanded unit and integration tests to cover event signing, validation, and edge cases. - Enhanced `README.md` with instructions for the new endpoint and Docker setup. - Added `Dockerfile` and `docker-compose.yml` for containerized deployment. - Updated `Cargo.toml` and `Cargo.lock` with new dependencies (`tower-http`, `tracing`). - Improved code structure for better separation of concerns and state handling.

Update Dockerfile and README with configurable default port support
- Made the default port configurable using a `DEFAULT_PORT` build argument in the Dockerfile. - Updated the `EXPOSE` and health check configuration to respect the configurable port. - Enhanced README.md with additional details on building the Docker image with custom ports.

Add endpoint tests for `/sign` and update README with testing instructions
- Introduced `.http` tests for `/sign` endpoint, covering valid and invalid scenarios. - Enhanced README.md with instructions to run endpoint tests using compatible IDEs. - Added assertion script to validate 400 Bad Request responses.

Add database integration with DuckDB and extend test coverage for database-backed features
- Integrated DuckDB for database support via the new `db.rs` module. - Implemented `Database` struct with methods for managing signing logs and configuration. - Updated `Config` to support a `db_path` setting with defaults. - Refactored `server.rs` and `main.rs` to use `AppState` with database dependency. - Added unit tests for `Database` functionality in `db_test.rs`.

Add `/api/bunker/status` endpoint with CORS support and test coverage
- Introduced `GET /api/bunker/status` to fetch bunker status and public key. - Enabled CORS in `server.rs` for enhanced API accessibility. - Extended integration and unit tests to cover the new endpoint. - Updated `README.md` with details and usage examples for the endpoint. - Enhanced database test coverage with additional scenarios.

Add `/api/bunker/logs` endpoint with test coverage and README update
- Introduced `GET /api/bunker/logs` endpoint to retrieve recent signing logs. - Added unit and integration tests to ensure endpoint functionality. - Updated `README.md` with usage instructions and sample responses. - Extended database functionality with log retrieval support. - Added `.http` test file for consistent testing of the new endpoint.

Add NIP-46 relay support for remote signing and enhance logging
- Introduced NIP-46 relay client for remote signing with configurable relays. - Updated `Config` with `NIP46_ENABLED` and `NIP46_RELAYS` settings. - Added logging for HTTP server and relay client lifecycle using `tracing`. - Modified database and server functionality for relay client integration. - Added `relay.rs` module and unit tests for relay functionality. - Updated `README.md` with NIP-46 usage and configuration details.

Add `RelayClient` implementation for NIP-46 support and unit tests
- Introduced `RelayClient` in `relay.rs` to handle NIP-46 requests with event subscription and relay integration. - Implemented relay connection management with configurable relays. - Added placeholder logic for handling NIP-46 requests (e.g., decryption and JSON-RPC parsing). - Added `relay_test.rs` with unit tests to validate `RelayClient` initialization and behavior.

Add NIP-46 request handling, integration, and test suite
- Enhanced `RelayClient` to fully handle NIP-46 JSON-RPC requests (e.g., `connect`, `sign_event`, `ping`). - Added `Nip46Handler` with support for client authorization, JSON-RPC parsing, and event signing. - Introduced `nip46.rs` module for NIP-46 protocol handling and encryption/decryption via NIP-44. - Updated `Signer` with support for NIP-44 encryption, decryption, and signing utilities. - Extended tests with `nip46_test.rs` for unit validation of NIP-46 behavior. - Improved integration tests for API endpoints and logging functionality. - Updated dependencies in `Cargo.toml`, test utilities, and `Cargo.lock`.

Refactor `AppState` structure, introduce metrics tracking, and unify state management
- Migrated `AppState` to a dedicated module (`state.rs`) to centralize and better manage application state. - Enhanced `AppState` with a unified structure incorporating HTTP requests, database, and NIP-46 handling. - Added endpoint `/api/bunker/metrics` for monitoring HTTP requests, NIP-46 connections, and signature counts. - Simplified `RelayClient` and API endpoints to utilize the unified `AppState` struct. - Updated tests to align with changes in `AppState` and added coverage for metrics tracking (e.g., `test_api_metrics`).

Add configuration management with `/api/bunker/config` endpoint and tests
- Introduced `GET /api/bunker/config` to retrieve current configuration. - Added `POST /api/bunker/config` for updating `nsec` and `nsec_file` values. - Updated `AppState` with thread-safe configuration management using `RwLock`. - Enhanced `Signer` for dynamic key updates. - Updated `Config` to support `nsec_file` and improved load logic for secure key handling. - Added integration tests covering configuration retrieval and updates. - Updated `README.md` with endpoint usage and examples.

Add team management support with `/api/bunker/team` endpoint and database integration
- Introduced team management with `GET /api/bunker/team` to retrieve members and `POST /api/bunker/team` to add members. - Implemented database schema and methods for managing team members (`add_team_member`, `get_team_members`, `remove_team_member`). - Added `TeamMember` struct for database entities and API responses. - Integrated validation for roles (`admin`, `signer`, `viewer`) and public key format (`npub1...`). - Updated `README.md` with endpoint usage instructions and examples. - Added unit and integration tests for team management functionality (`test_db_team_management`, etc.).

Update configuration behavior to require restart and enhance security handling
- Changed `POST /api/bunker/config` to require a restart for applying config changes (e.g., `nsec`, `nsec_file`). - Enhanced config update logic to validate input explicitly, store changes in the database, and defer in-memory updates until restart. - Updated response to include restart-related messaging and optional new pubkey in case of `nsec` update. - Modified `GET /api/bunker/config` to omit `nsec` field for security purposes. - Updated tests to verify configuration persistence, restart behavior, and error handling. - Refined `README.md` to reflect restart requirements and updated instructions for config updates.

Refactor test app setup and add integration tests for team management
- Replaced `get_app` with a consistent `setup_app` function across integration tests for improved readability and reuse. - Added `team_api_test.rs` to cover the complete team management flow. - Ensured validation for invalid roles and public key formats in the team management tests.

MESSAGE.value: Initialize project with essential files and dependencies: - Added `Cargo.toml` with core dependencies (`tokio`, `nostr`, `anyhow`, etc.). - Created `main.rs` with a basic async entry point. - Added initial re-export in `lib.rs`. - Included `.gitignore` for `.idea/` files. - Added development guidelines to `.junie/guidelines.md`. - Generated `Cargo.lock` file.

Add health check, server, and configuration modules with tests
- Introduced `config.rs` for loading environment variables and configuration management. - Implemented `server.rs` with a basic health check endpoint (`GET /health`). - Added test files for unit and integration tests: `config_test.rs`, `server_test.rs`, and `api_test.rs`. - Extended `README.md` with usage, API description, and testing instructions. - Updated `.gitignore` to exclude `.env` files. - Added necessary dependencies (`axum`, `dotenvy`, `serde`, etc.) to `Cargo.toml`.

Add event signing feature, Docker support, and improved server architecture
- Added `POST /sign` endpoint for signing events with validation and detailed error handling. - Introduced the `Signer` struct to securely handle key operations. - Updated `server.rs` with `tower-http` for request tracing and middleware support. - Expanded unit and integration tests to cover event signing, validation, and edge cases. - Enhanced `README.md` with instructions for the new endpoint and Docker setup. - Added `Dockerfile` and `docker-compose.yml` for containerized deployment. - Updated `Cargo.toml` and `Cargo.lock` with new dependencies (`tower-http`, `tracing`). - Improved code structure for better separation of concerns and state handling.

Update Dockerfile and README with configurable default port support
- Made the default port configurable using a `DEFAULT_PORT` build argument in the Dockerfile. - Updated the `EXPOSE` and health check configuration to respect the configurable port. - Enhanced README.md with additional details on building the Docker image with custom ports.

Add endpoint tests for `/sign` and update README with testing instructions
- Introduced `.http` tests for `/sign` endpoint, covering valid and invalid scenarios. - Enhanced README.md with instructions to run endpoint tests using compatible IDEs. - Added assertion script to validate 400 Bad Request responses.

Add database integration with DuckDB and extend test coverage for database-backed features
- Integrated DuckDB for database support via the new `db.rs` module. - Implemented `Database` struct with methods for managing signing logs and configuration. - Updated `Config` to support a `db_path` setting with defaults. - Refactored `server.rs` and `main.rs` to use `AppState` with database dependency. - Added unit tests for `Database` functionality in `db_test.rs`.

Add `/api/bunker/status` endpoint with CORS support and test coverage
- Introduced `GET /api/bunker/status` to fetch bunker status and public key. - Enabled CORS in `server.rs` for enhanced API accessibility. - Extended integration and unit tests to cover the new endpoint. - Updated `README.md` with details and usage examples for the endpoint. - Enhanced database test coverage with additional scenarios.

Add `/api/bunker/logs` endpoint with test coverage and README update
- Introduced `GET /api/bunker/logs` endpoint to retrieve recent signing logs. - Added unit and integration tests to ensure endpoint functionality. - Updated `README.md` with usage instructions and sample responses. - Extended database functionality with log retrieval support. - Added `.http` test file for consistent testing of the new endpoint.

Add NIP-46 relay support for remote signing and enhance logging
- Introduced NIP-46 relay client for remote signing with configurable relays. - Updated `Config` with `NIP46_ENABLED` and `NIP46_RELAYS` settings. - Added logging for HTTP server and relay client lifecycle using `tracing`. - Modified database and server functionality for relay client integration. - Added `relay.rs` module and unit tests for relay functionality. - Updated `README.md` with NIP-46 usage and configuration details.

Add `RelayClient` implementation for NIP-46 support and unit tests
- Introduced `RelayClient` in `relay.rs` to handle NIP-46 requests with event subscription and relay integration. - Implemented relay connection management with configurable relays. - Added placeholder logic for handling NIP-46 requests (e.g., decryption and JSON-RPC parsing). - Added `relay_test.rs` with unit tests to validate `RelayClient` initialization and behavior.

Add NIP-46 request handling, integration, and test suite
- Enhanced `RelayClient` to fully handle NIP-46 JSON-RPC requests (e.g., `connect`, `sign_event`, `ping`). - Added `Nip46Handler` with support for client authorization, JSON-RPC parsing, and event signing. - Introduced `nip46.rs` module for NIP-46 protocol handling and encryption/decryption via NIP-44. -

Add NIP-46 request handling, integration, and test suite
- Enhanced `RelayClient` to fully handle NIP-46 JSON-RPC requests (e.g., `connect`, `sign_event`, `ping`). - Added `Nip46Handler` with support for client authorization, JSON-RPC parsing, and event signing. - Introduced `nip46.rs` module for NIP-46 protocol handling and encryption/decryption via NIP-44. - Updated `Signer` with support for NIP-44 encryption, decryption, and signing utilities. - Extended tests with `nip46_test.rs` for unit validation of NIP-46 behavior. - Improved integration tests for API endpoints and logging functionality. - Updated dependencies in `Cargo.toml`, test utilities, and `Cargo.lock`.

Refactor `AppState` structure, introduce metrics tracking, and unify state management
- Migrated `AppState` to a dedicated module (`state.rs`) to centralize and better manage application state. - Enhanced `AppState` with a unified structure incorporating HTTP requests, database, and NIP-46 handling. - Added endpoint `/api/bunker/metrics` for monitoring HTTP requests, NIP-46 connections, and signature counts. - Simplified `RelayClient` and API endpoints to utilize the unified `AppState` struct. - Updated tests to align with changes in `AppState` and added coverage for metrics tracking (e.g., `test_api_metrics`).

Add configuration management with `/api/bunker/config` endpoint and tests
- Introduced `GET /api/bunker/config` to retrieve current configuration. - Added `POST /api/bunker/config` for updating `nsec` and `nsec_file` values. - Updated `AppState` with thread-safe configuration management using `RwLock`. - Enhanced `Signer` for dynamic key updates. - Updated `Config` to support `nsec_file` and improved load logic for secure key handling. - Added integration tests covering configuration retrieval and updates. - Updated `README.md` with endpoint usage and examples.

Add team management support with `/api/bunker/team` endpoint and database integration
- Introduced team management with `GET /api/bunker/team` to retrieve members and `POST /api/bunker/team` to add members. - Implemented database schema and methods for managing team members (`add_team_member`, `get_team_members`, `remove_team_member`). - Added `TeamMember` struct for database entities and API responses. - Integrated validation for roles (`admin`, `signer`, `viewer`) and public key format (`npub1...`). - Updated `README.md` with endpoint usage instructions and examples. - Added unit and integration tests for

Add team management support with `/api/bunker/team` endpoint and database integration
- Introduced team management with `GET /api/bunker/team` to retrieve members and `POST /api/bunker/team` to add members. - Implemented database schema and methods for managing team members (`add_team_member`, `get_team_members`, `remove_team_member`). - Added `TeamMember` struct for database entities and API responses. - Integrated validation for roles (`admin`, `signer`, `viewer`) and public key format (`npub1...`). - Updated `README.md` with endpoint usage instructions and examples. - Added unit and integration tests for team management functionality (`test_db_team_management`, etc.).

Update configuration behavior to require restart and enhance security handling
- Changed `POST /api/bunker/config` to require a restart for applying config changes (e.g., `nsec`, `nsec_file`). - Enhanced config update logic to validate input explicitly, store changes in the database, and defer in-memory updates until restart. - Updated response to include restart-related messaging and optional new pubkey in case of `nsec` update. - Modified `GET /api/bunker/config` to omit `nsec` field for security purposes. - Updated tests to verify configuration persistence, restart behavior, and error handling. - Refined `README.md` to reflect restart requirements and updated instructions for config updates.

Refactor test app setup and add integration tests for team management
- Replaced `get_app` with a consistent `setup_app` function across integration tests for improved readability and reuse. - Added `team_api_test.rs` to cover the complete team management flow. - Ensured validation for invalid roles and public key formats in the team management tests.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
Refactor test app setup and add integration tests for team management
- Replaced `get_app` with a consistent `setup_app` function across integration tests for improved readability and reuse. - Added `team_api_test.rs` to cover the complete team management flow. - Ensured validation for invalid roles and public key formats in the team management tests.
